heading: Governing body
label: 60105 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60105(a)36:4806., , §§ 1605(b) (related to discrimination in holding office), 1606, 1607, .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–510, title XVI104 Stat. 173760105(b)36:4807.60105(c)36:4805(b) (related to discrimination in holding office).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and shall be in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” are omitted as unnecessary.

L. 101–510, title XVI104 Stat. 173760105(b)36:4807.60105(c)36:4805(b) (related to discrimination in holding office).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and shall be in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, disability, or national origin.
